title: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 - Released

detail.title: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 - Released
detail.short_info: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 released at ugadmissions.iiit.ac.in. Download IIITH UGEE hall ticket, check exam date (2 May 2026), timing (9 AM–12 PM), exam pattern and important exam‑day instructions.

sections.heading: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 - Released

content.text: The International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad (IIIT‑H) has issued the IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 for the Undergraduate Entrance Examination (UGEE) for its 5‑year dual degree B.Tech + MS by Research programmes. The admit cards have been released on April 21, 2026, and are available for download through the official UG admissions portal ugadmissions.iiit.ac.in.
The UGEE 2026 exam will be conducted on May 2, 2026, as a computer‑based test from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM.
Click Here: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026

sections.heading: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 - Overview

rows: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad (IIIT-H)
UGEE 2026 admit cards released on April 21, 2026

sections.heading: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 Download Link

content.text: The UGEE admit card download link is active on the official UG admissions portal. Candidates who successfully submitted their UGEE 2026 application form can log in using their registered credentials and download the IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 in PDF format.
The admit card is a mandatory document for entry into the exam centre and must be preserved until the completion of the admission process, including interviews and counselling.

sections.heading: How to Download IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: Candidates can follow these steps to download the UGEE 2026 hall ticket:

items: Visit the official IIIT Hyderabad UG admissions portal: ugadmissions.iiit.ac.in.
Click on the UGEE 2026 admit card / hall ticket download link available on the homepage or announcements section.
Log in using your registered User ID / application number and password (and date of birth, if asked).
After successful login, the IIITH UGEE Admit Card 2026 will be displayed on the screen in PDF format.
Check all details carefully, then download and take a clear printout of the hall ticket.

content.text: In case of any discrepancy in name, photograph, signature, or exam centre details, candidates should promptly contact the UG admissions office at IIIT Hyderabad via the contact details given on the portal.

sections.heading: IIIT Hyderabad UGEE 2026 Exam Date, Time and Pattern

content.text: The IIIT Hyderabad UGEE 2026 exam is scheduled to be held on May 2, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM. The exam is a 3‑hour computer‑based test consisting of two sections:

items: SUPR (Subject Proficiency Test) – 60 minutes
REAP (Research Aptitude Test) – 120 minutes

content.text: The test evaluates both core subject understanding and research aptitude, and there is a 25% negative marking scheme in each section.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on IIITH UGEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: The IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026 contains key details that candidates must verify before the exam. Typically, the hall ticket includes:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Application number / roll number
Exam name: UGEE 2026
Exam date: May 2, 2026
Exam timing: 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM
Exam centre name and full address
Reporting time and gate closing time, if specified
Important exam‑day instructions and guidelines

content.text: Any mismatch between application details and hall ticket details must be reported to the institute immediately for correction.

sections.heading: Documents Required with IIIT Hyderabad UGEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of UGEE 2026, candidates must carry the following items to the exam centre:

items: A printed copy of the IIITH UGEE Admit Card 2026
One original government‑issued photo ID proof, such as: Aadhaar Card Voter ID PAN Card Passport Driving Licence
Aadhaar Card
Voter ID
PAN Card
Passport
Driving Licence
Additional photographs if mentioned in the instructions on the admit card

content.text: Without the admit card and valid photo ID, candidates will not be allowed to enter the examination hall.
IIIT Hyderabad has prescribed several exam‑day rules and instructions that candidates must follow:

items: Reach the exam centre well before reporting time to complete security checks and verification.
Carry only essential items: admit card, photo ID, and allowed stationery as per instructions.
Do not carry prohibited items such as mobile phones, smart watches, calculators, Bluetooth devices, or any electronic gadgets inside the exam hall.
Follow all directions of exam invigilators and strictly adhere to the exam timing and rules.
Any involvement in unfair means or malpractice can lead to cancellation of candidature and disqualification from the admission process.
